## Result
- **Brick**: fileread
- **Mode**: brick
- **Mini-task**: Head (first 30 lines) to extract import paths + Tail (last 4 lines) to identify the private method name in `test-repo/packages/core/injector/injector.ts`
- **Answer**:

  **Part 1 — Import module paths (in order of appearance, first 30 lines):**
  ```
  @nestjs/common
  @nestjs/common/constants
  @nestjs/common/interfaces
  @nestjs/common/utils/cli-colors.util
  @nestjs/common/utils/shared.utils
  iterare
  perf_hooks
  ```

  **Part 2 — Private method name (last lines):**
  ```
  getNowTimestamp
  ```

- **Turns used**: 7
- **Tools used**: `mcp__focus__fr_head`, `mcp__focus__fr_tail`
- **Rough token estimate**: ~1,200
- **Notes**: The strict 4-line tail did not include the `private` keyword (the method signature was at line −6 from EOF; the 4-line tail captured only `return performance.now();`, `}`, `}`, and a trailing empty line). A second `fr_tail` call with 10 lines was needed to surface `private getNowTimestamp()`. This is expected behaviour — the task spec assumes 4 lines is sufficient, but the actual method signature sits one line outside that window. No other fallbacks or workarounds were required.
